# Mathematical Expressions

## Inline Math (if supported)

The quadratic formula is $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$.

Einstein's equation: $E = mc^2$.

The area of a circle: $A = \pi r^2$.

Euler's identity: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$.

## Block Math (if supported)

$$
\sum_{i=1}^{n} i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}
$$

$$
\int_{0}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$

$$
\begin{bmatrix}
a & b \\
c & d
\end{bmatrix}
\begin{bmatrix}
x \\
y
\end{bmatrix}
=
\begin{bmatrix}
ax + by \\
cx + dy
\end{bmatrix}
$$

$$
f(x) = \begin{cases}
  x^2 & \text{if } x \geq 0 \\
  -x^2 & \text{if } x < 0
\end{cases}
$$

## Math as Plain Text (fallback)

If math rendering is not supported, the above should at least display the LaTeX source in a readable format.
